title: Understanding the organization and its context
description: Determine external and internal issues relevant to purpose and strategic direction.

title: Understanding the needs and expectations of interested parties
description: Identify interested parties and their requirements relevant to the QMS.

title: Leadership and commitment
description: Top management demonstrates leadership and commitment to the QMS.

title: Actions to address risks and opportunities
description: Plan actions to address risks and opportunities and integrate into QMS processes.

title: Documented information
description: Control and maintain documented information required by the QMS and ISO 9001.

title: Control of nonconforming outputs
description: Ensure nonconforming outputs are identified and controlled.

title: Internal audit
description: Conduct internal audits at planned intervals to provide QMS conformity information.

title: Nonconformity and corrective action
description: React to nonconformities and implement corrective actions to prevent recurrence.
